subject: Task-driven role preview pages
fact: Task-driven preview pages should reuse src/main/webapp/assets/js/components/mock-task-ui-utils.js for role gate copy, task status badges, priority badges, notification variants, and grouped task lanes; organizer pages already depend on it and volunteer pages were built on the same helper.
reason: Future task-centric role modules and code reviews need to avoid reintroducing role-specific task helper duplication after the Phase 5 refactor.
